message:
chore: add .cargo/ and .rustup/ to gitignore

Add local Cargo and Rustup cache directories to .gitignore to prevent
agent workspace artifacts from being accidentally committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -43,3 +43,7 @@ claude-upgrade-progress.json
 
 # Shell command artifacts (from malformed redirects like `> =`)
 =
+
+# Local Cargo and Rustup caches (agent workspace artifacts)
+.cargo/
+.rustup/
